title: balance() confirms notes with block_height=0 DEFAULT after migration v4
description: Migration v4 added block_height INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 to notes. Any note row that existed before v4 now has block_height=0. balance() computes threshold = scan_tip - min_confirmations; at mainnet height ~2.5M the threshold is ~2.5M, which is >> 0, so these legacy notes satisfy block_height <= threshold and are permanently classified as confirmed regardless of their actual receipt height. The notes also appear with value_zatoshi from before decryption was added (migration v6). Impact: stale pre-migration rows, if any exist in production wallets, inflate confirmed balance.
